# SML x402 Signal API
> Pay-per-call US equities trading signals for AI agents.

## Endpoints
- GET /signal/:ticker/teaser - FREE bias only
- GET /signal/:ticker - $0.01 bias + momentum score
- GET /regime/:ticker - $0.05 full multi-factor regime
- GET /squeeze/:ticker - $0.25 short-squeeze pressure engine

## Payment: Base USDC via x402 protocol
## Auth: X-Payment-Token header
## Signed: Ed25519 response signing
## Affiliate: 30% USDC revenue-share (?aff=0x...)

## Built by ScriptMasterLabs (SDVOSB) - ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com
